{{Quote|This is the Mother Goddess Onrai, she who gives and never receives, Mistress of the planet Notron, cradle of all Humans in the galaxy. If you would learn more, touch Onrai, and doors will open.|Pedestal inscription|<ref name="SW84" />}}
'''Onrai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Deity/Legends|deity]] worshipped by the [[Seoularian]]s, a race of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] that once ruled an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] around their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Seoul 5]]. She was a mother goddess, embodying fertility and generosity. Onrai was also believed to be the Mistress of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the fountainhead of Human civilization, which the Seoularians called "Notron." A statue was erected in the goddess' honor in the [[Seoul 5 city|main city]] on Seoul 5, which hid entrance to the planet's [[Crystal control room|control room]].<ref name="SW84" />
